zotero.abstractNote: We propose a novel Bayesian neural network architecture, the Neural Linear Model with Functional Gaussian Process Priors (NLM-FGPP). By placing a functional Gaussian process prior over the last layer of a neural network, we obtain a model that is both flexible and tractable. We show that the NLM-FGPP can be trained efficiently using variational inference and that it outperforms standard Bayesian neural networks on a variety of regression tasks.
zotero.conferenceName: 3rd Symposium on Advances in Approximate Bayesian Inference
zotero.proceedingsTitle: 3rd Symposium on Advances in Approximate Bayesian Inference
